evals.prompt: I need batch cert analysis for example.com, api.example.com, and mail.example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-batch-analysis skill for this certificate batch analysis request and produce the documented result for example.com, api.example.com, and mail.example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-batch-analysis for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_batch_analyze.
Keeps the response focused on analyzing SSL/TLS security for multiple domains at once, batch security scoring, or comparing security posture across organizations.

evals.prompt: Compare the certificate posture for example.com, api.example.com, and mail.example.com in one batch report.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-batch-analysis skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-batch-analysis instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
